mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_lineage_metrics_tmp (id, metric_code, metric_name, dimension, column_name, api_url, table_name, creator, create_time, updater, update_time, physical_level, timeliness, tag_info_id) SELECT dt.id, dt.warehouse_code AS metric_code, ti.tag_name AS metric_name, dt.time_dimension AS dimension, dt.warehouse_code AS column_name, dt.api_url, dt.tag_table AS table_name, 'SYSTEM' AS creator, dt.create_time, 'SYSTEM' AS updater, dt.update_time, ti.physical_level, ti.timeliness, dt.tag_info_id FROM biz_data.dw_tag_info dt JOIN biz_data.tag_info ti ON dt.tag_info_id = ti.id AND ti.deleted = false WHERE dt.api_url IS NOT NULL AND dt.tag_table IS NOT NULL
